original_statement: are there more radio stations in milan or in rome?
mutated_statement: are there more something in one place or in another place?
mutation_analysis: 实体替换 + 泛化/模糊化: 具体名词和地名被泛化为模糊指代 | radio stations → something | milan → one place | rome → another place

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的内容可识别关键信息：judge_thought 明确写道“Counting the "location" column: - Rome: ... → 11 stations. - Milan: ... → 8 stations. Rome has more entries than Milan, so the prediction ‘rome’ is correct.”（直接给出计数和结论）。Agent的具体表现为直接执行simple_query并逐行计数，给出确定性答案“Rome”，未在任何地方提及问题的泛化或模糊性、未请求澄清、也未使用ambiguous/unclear/无法确定等词汇。因为Agent把变异问题视为清晰可操作的数据查询并直接输出结论，且没有表现出对目标不明确的任何认识或询问，所以归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
